response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior software engineer with ~18 years of experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-performance backend systems, plus recent exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling. However, the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, and the resume shows only about one year of AI-adjacent infrastructure work with no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks in production. Cloud experience (AWS CDK) and customer-facing consulting depth also appear light relative to a Staff Forward Deployed Engineer profile.
strengths: Recent hands-on MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, directly relevant to key technologies
Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD) and production-scale systems experience
Proven technical leadership and mentoring via workshops, courses, and open-source project ownership
concerns: Falls far short of the 8+ years of production AI solutions requirement (~1 year of AI-adjacent work)
No demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent frameworks
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing delivery and cloud AI system design expected of a forward deployed staff engineer

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector-DB and AI evaluation depth
